channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hat trick puts Alex Ovechkin 13 away from breaking Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin had so many chance to score in the Washington Capitals’ rout of the Edmonton Oilers that he joked, “I’ll take three.”.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Maine governor 'should want to protect women and women's sports,' Sen Marsha Blackburn says
item.description: Sen. Marsha Blackburn, R-Tenn., reacted to the public spat between Maine Gov. Janet Mills and President Donald Trump on "Fox News Live" on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Rodriguez makes half-court shot, wins Bucknell student $10,000
item.description: LEWISBURG, Pa. (AP) — Former Major League Baseball star Alex Rodriguez showed his skill on the hardwood Sunday, making a half-court shot to win a Bucknell student $10,000.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Liverpool marching toward Premier League title after statement win at Man City
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Can anyone stop Liverpool's march toward the Premier League title? Not Manchester City, that's for sure.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hockey legend defends Wayne Gretzky amid criticism at 4 Nations final over Trump ties
item.description: Hockey legend Bobby Orr came to the defense of Wayne Gretzky in an op-ed on Saturday as "The Great One" was criticized during the 4 Nations final.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arizona apologizes for 'unacceptable chant' from fans at end of basketball loss to BYU
item.description: Arizona has apologized after the school says some fans participated in an “unacceptable chant” following the basketball team’s 96-95 loss to BYU on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Saturday’s Bay Area basketball playoffs: Top storylines, surprises, trends, more
item.description: Moreau Catholic sizzles in second half to advance in NCS Division II playoffs. Dillon Casey leads Piedmont into Division IV semifinals. Santa Teresa boys top 80 points again in thrilling win over Independence in CCS Division I bracket.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lefkow, Correspondent, Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: 49ers free agency: Why Greenlaw, Hufanga decisions pit common sense against emotion
item.description: 49ers have legitimate durability concerns with unrestricted free agents Dre Greenlaw and Talanoa Hufanga.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Rancho Bernardo 8, Patrick Henry 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-CIF Girls Water Polo Division One title game Rancho Bernardo beat Patrick Henry wins a great game in double overtime 8-7.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kent Johnson scores 2 goals, the Blue Jackets beat the Blackhawks 5-1 to end a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Zach Werenski scored and had two assists and Kent Johnson scored twice for the Columbus Blue Jackets in a 5-1 victory against the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aldrich Potgieter hangs on to 1-shot lead in Mexico Open
item.description: VALLARTA, Mexico (AP) — Aldrich Potgieter had the lead going into the final round of the Mexico Open, minus the cushion he enjoyed after a sloppy finish Saturday that made him settle for a 4-under 67 and a one-shot advantage over Brian Campbell at Vidanta Vallarta.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto hits a 426-foot home run in his first at-bat for the New York Mets
item.description: PORT ST. LUCIE, Fla. (AP) — Juan Soto wasted little time in showing off his power for his new team. Again. Soto homered in his first spring training at-bat for the New York Mets, hitting a solo shot to left-center field in the first inning against Houston on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trans activist suggests combining Olympics and Paralympics, creating gender-neutral competition
item.description: Trans activist Blossom Brown suggested Thursday that the Olympics should "absolutely" be gender-neutral during an appearance on "Piers Morgan Uncensored.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Red Rocks clinch Big 12 regular season title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 Conference’s first gymnastics regular-season title. The Red Rocks earned the title Friday after a 198.075-197.525 victory against Denver to go 6-0 during league play.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off shatters expectations as a hockey showcase. The Milan Olympics are up next
item.description: Canada won the 4 Nations Face-Off by beating the United States for the championship in an overtime thriller capped off by Connor McDavid's memorable goal that will be on highlight reels for decades to come.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Singer of Canadian anthem at 4 Nations Face-Off changes lyric to protest Trump's 51st state remarks
item.description: The anthem singer who performed the Canadian anthem prior to the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game Thursday night changed a lyric in “O Canada” as a response to U.S. President Donald Trump's repeated remarks about making the country the 51st state.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO and KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utah State blasts San Jose State, 105-57
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team got back on track following Sunday's heartbreaking loss to New Mexico with a resounding beatdown over San Jose State Wednesday night, 105-57.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL settles for scoreless draw in Champions Cup opener
item.description: SAN JOSE, Costa Rica (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake kicked off its 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a scoreless draw against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano in RSL's first Champions Cup game since 2016. "I thought it was a really hard fought game," said RSL head coach Pablo Mastroeni.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How Central Girls Wrestling reached the pinnacle of Colorado Wrestling
item.description:
Central Girls Wrestling, aka D51 Phoenix, featuring girls from all four D51 high schools, has done it.
They are the cream of the crop.
The top of the heap.
The best in the state.
They are the undisputed 5A State Champions.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Padres fans unite to restore North Park mural defaced by Dodgers graffiti
item.description: North Park residents are rallying to restore a beloved San Diego Padres mural in the neighborhood after it was defaced last month with blue spray paint, suggestive of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Mastroeni prepares Real Salt Lake for a physical battle in Costa Rica
item.description: Real Salt Lake head coach Pablo Mastroeni anticipates a fierce contest as his team travels to Costa Rica for their first competitive match of 2025 — a CONCACAF Champions Cup Round One clash against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: BYU makes a statement, crushing Kansas, 91-57
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In one of the biggest blowouts in the history of Kansas basketball, BYU made a big-time statement with a dominating 91-57 win over the Jayhawks Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Right-hander Nick Pivetta, Padres finalize $55M four-year contract
item.description: Right-hander Nick Pivetta and the San Diego Padres officially announced a finalized $55 million, four-year contract on Monday, a backloaded deal that allows him to opt out after the 2026 and '27 seasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Cubs manager Craig Counsell goes 1-on-1 with GN Sports from spring training
item.description: MESA, Ariz. — All baseball seasons are a roller-coaster ride to some degree, but Craig Counsell's first season as manager of the Cubs was especially up and down.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies lose heartbreaker at first place New Mexico
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE (ABC4 Sports) - With first place in the Mountain West men’s basketball standings on the line, Utah State (22-4, 12-3 MW) fell just short on Sunday in Albuquerque, dropping an 82-79 thriller at The Pit. This marked the second time in two weeks the Aggies have lost to the Lobos.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
